# VERIFY: #152 — Context-isolated validation for product plays
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that self-validation is eliminated and context-isolated judge validation is correctly implemented

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] judge.md has Skill tool in its tools list
- [ ] judge.md documents product artifact validation mode with context isolation rules
- [ ] validate-roadmap skill exists at core/components/skills/validate-roadmap/SKILL.md
- [ ] validate-architecture-design skill exists at core/components/skills/validate-architecture-design/SKILL.md
- [ ] discover-product Step 6 uses judge agent, not product-strategist
- [ ] discover-product Step 6 contract passes ONLY artifact path — no drafting context
- [ ] plan-roadmap has a judge validation step after produce-roadmap
- [ ] prepare-architecture has a judge validation step before lock
- [ ] All three plays' agent boundary tables include judge
- [ ] Status file schemas updated with new validation task entries
- [ ] Pre-lock resolution gates unchanged in all 3 plays
- [ ] Human checkpoints (brief review) unchanged in all 3 plays

### Verification Steps
| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| V1 | Read judge.md tools list | Contains Skill alongside existing tools |
| V2 | Read discover-product SKILL.md Step 6 | Agent is judge, contract has only product_yaml_path |
| V3 | Read plan-roadmap SKILL.md | New step between produce-roadmap and scenario-evals uses judge |
| V4 | Read prepare-architecture SKILL.md | New step between pre-lock and lock uses judge |
| V5 | Grep for "product-strategist" in discover-product Step 6 | Zero matches (no longer the validator) |
| V6 | Read validate-roadmap/SKILL.md | Exists, has Input/Process/Output/Constraints sections |
| V7 | Read validate-architecture-design/SKILL.md | Exists, checks stack specificity, NFR traceability, QP coverage |

### Edge Cases
| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| Judge validation fails on product.yaml | Pre-lock resolution gate presents blockers, same cycle-back logic applies |
| Judge validation finds 0 issues | Auto-proceed to lock (Branch A behavior unchanged) |
| Existing locked products without profiles | validate-product-vision checks profiles only if profiles section present |
| Resume after interruption during judge step | Status file tracks judge validation task, resume restarts it |
